title: T-Deck gateway: RPL root with WiFi backhaul
description: Ensure full RPL root behavior when WiFi is active: send DIOs with prefix info, handle DAO from nodes, maintain routing table. Integrate with WiFi net_if. Update CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_RPL_ROOT and rpl_root.c / lichen_rpl_dodag.
notes: Escalating: T-Deck gateway RPL root/IPv6 prefix/WiFi backhaul design needs human judgment on net_if integration, prefix advertisement, routing
